_comment: Model metadata for Panya Manee V1. Classifications based on empirical observation on Mac mini M4 16GB.

models.notes: Runnable but closer to upper edge of 16GB. Best quality model in current benchmark.
Fastest model in current benchmark. Comfortable fit on 16GB.
Conservative classification. Empirical observation listed as comfortable, but 8.6GB loaded on 16GB machine (54% RAM) is borderline. Classified tight to be explicit per project policy.
Smallest loaded footprint. Best size-aware efficiency.
